_comment: Startup entries safe to disable on nearly any Windows 11 machine. Match on entry name (Run key value name) OR command (exe path). Match is case-insensitive substring. Each entry: id, matchNames (registry Run value names / Startup shortcut names), matchCommandSubstrings (exe/path substrings for tighter matching), reason, category. The apply step disables via 'Set-ItemProperty' delete of the Run entry (with snapshot for revert) or renames Startup-folder .lnk to .lnk.disabled.

adobe.reason_group: Adobe updater trays — Creative Cloud handles its own updates, these are legacy trays.

entries.reason: Old Adobe update tray. Creative Cloud Desktop already handles updates.
Acrobat Reader background updater tray.
Adobe Genuine Software Integrity — background license check.

apple_legacy.reason_group: Apple helpers used only if you actively sync an iPhone / play iTunes.

entries.reason: iTunes device-connect detector. Not needed if you don't sync an iPhone via USB.
QuickTime is discontinued on Windows since 2016.

windows_legacy.reason_group: Legacy Windows components no longer used.

entries.reason: Windows Sidebar (Vista/7). Discontinued in 8+.

updater_bloat.reason_group: Standalone updaters — separate services already run in the background.

entries.reason: Google Update service + scheduled task handle Chrome updates; the Run entry is redundant.
Edge preloads on login to make cold-open feel fast. Kills ~200MB RAM.
Steam auto-start. Disable if you launch Steam manually — the main client entry is the one that opens the store.
Epic launcher auto-start.

nag_startups.reason_group: Nag / reminder startups from products you probably already use manually.

entries.reason: Skype auto-launch. Disable if you don't use Skype daily.
OneDrive setup nag — NOT the OneDrive sync client. The active sync client is the 'OneDrive' entry, which is on the tripwire list.
Spotify auto-launch on login.

oem_bloat.reason_group: OEM helper apps most users never open.

entries.reason: HP Support Assistant tray. Ask user — some rely on it for driver alerts.
Lenovo Vantage nag/toast. The service runs regardless — this is just the Run-key nag.
Dell nag tray.
Asus Armoury Crate autostart — heavy tray.

third_party_utility_nag.reason_group: Third-party tray utilities that spawn nags.

entries.reason: CCleaner monitoring tray. Ask user.
McAfee WebAdvisor tray — browser extension companion. Disable if the browser extension is removed.
Norton auto-start nag.
Avast tray nag. AV engine runs as a service regardless.
